parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the mathematical function used to create the blur.

parameters.name: widthchan
parameters.label: Kernel Width Channel
parameters.description: The greyscale can be any channel of the second input, or composites like luminance and RGB average.

parameters.name: blackvalue
parameters.label: Black Value
parameters.description: The pixel luminance value used for the Black Filter Size parameter below.

parameters.name: whitevalue
parameters.label: White Value
parameters.description: The pixel luminance value used for the White Filter Size parameter below.

parameters.name: blackwidth
parameters.label: Black Filter Width
parameters.description: The amount of blur where the second input is black.

parameters.name: whitewidth
parameters.label: White Filter Width
parameters.description: The amount of blur where the second input is white.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: Sets the extend conditions to determine what happens to the blur at the edge of the image.
